description: "Simulate the adoption curve across team archetypes. Map personas to Rogers archetypes (innovator/early-adopter/early-maj"
---
Simulate the adoption curve across team archetypes. Map personas to Rogers archetypes (innovator/early-adopter/early-majority/late-majority/laggard). For each archetype: predict time-to-adoption, identify adoption blockers, estimate what percentage of the team falls in this segment. Output: adoption curve table with time estimates per archetype, blocker list ranked by impact, and an overall adoption readiness score. Artifact saved to signals/validate/adoption/{{topic}}-adoption-{{date}}.md.

## Archetype Mapping

For each persona in the team, assign to a Rogers archetype:

| Persona | Archetype | Time-to-adoption | Key blocker |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|-------------|
|         |           |                 |             |

## Adoption Curve

| Archetype | % of team | Time-to-adoption | Primary blocker | Mitigation |
|-----------|-----------|-----------------|-----------------|------------|
| Innovator (2.5%) | | Week 1 | | |
| Early Adopter (13.5%) | | Week 2-4 | | |
| Early Majority (34%) | | Month 2-3 | | |
| Late Majority (34%) | | Month 4-6 | | |
| Laggard (16%) | | Month 6+ | | |

## Adoption Blockers

Ranked by impact on time-to-adoption:

1. [Blocker] -- affects [archetypes] -- mitigation: [action]
2. ...

## Adoption Readiness Score

Score (0-100): [X]
Interpretation: [what this means for rollout planning]
Recommended rollout: [who to onboard first, champion strategy]
